specs.title: cp-000: Deleting a comment reloads the thread list from local storage immediately
cp-001: Reference sidebar renders only when its open prop is true
cp-002: Reference sidebar header title is References
cp-003: Reference sidebar header count pill shows the total referencessize
cp-004: Reference sidebar header Plus button delegates to onOpenCitationDialog
cp-005: Reference sidebar sort button opens a dropdown with four sort modes
cp-006: Sort menu options are By citation By author By year and By date added
cp-007: Selecting a sort mode closes the sort menu immediately
cp-008: Reference filter input placeholder is Filter references
cp-009: Empty sidebar state headline is No references yet
cp-010: Empty sidebar state CTA label is Add your first reference
cp-011: References are partitioned into cited and uncited groups based on referenceNumbe
cp-012: Uncited section heading reads Not cited N with a warning icon
cp-013: Cited rows show numeric labels like 1
cp-014: Uncited rows show -- instead of a citation number
cp-015: Expanded reference rows show full metadata for Title Authors Journal Year DOI PM
cp-016: Expanded reference rows render DOI and PMID values as outbound links when presen
cp-017: Expanded reference rows expose an Open DOI action only when a DOI exists
cp-018: Expanded reference rows expose a Copy DOI action only when a DOI exists
cp-019: Copy DOI copies the full httpsdoiorg URL to the clipboard rather than only the D
cp-020: Remove action is protected by a windowconfirmRemove this reference from the side
cp-021: Cancelling the browser confirm leaves the reference untouched
cp-022: Confirming removal deletes the reference from store and collapses its detail vie
cp-023: Dispatching scholarsyncscroll-to-reference expands the target row and scrolls it
cp-024: Version History button is disabled while the editor route is still loading
cp-025: Version History button is also disabled when there is no editorContent
cp-026: Opening Version History renders a right-side fixed panel rather than a modal dia
cp-027: Version History panel header title is Version History
cp-028: Version History includes a full-width Save Current Version button at the top
cp-029: Clicking Save Current Version opens a browser prompt asking for a version name
cp-030: Empty or cancelled prompt submission aborts manual version creation
cp-031: Version History initial loading state shows only a centered spinner in the panel
cp-032: Version History empty state text is No versions yet
cp-033: Auto-saved versions display Auto-save when no explicit name exists
cp-034: Manual versions display Manual save when no explicit name exists
